abilities.name: electromorphosis
abilities.shortEffect: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
abilities.effect: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

abilities.name: static
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of paralyzing attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being paralyzed. Pokémon that are immune to Electric-type moves can still be paralyzed by this ability. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, there is a 50% chance that encounters will be with an Electric Pokémon, if applicable.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is charged with static electricity and may paralyze attackers that make direct contact with it.

abilities.name: damp
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents Self-Destruct, Explosion, and Aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
abilities.effect: While this Pokémon is in battle, Self-Destruct and Explosion will fail and Aftermath will not take effect.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon dampens its surroundings, preventing all Pokémon from using explosive moves such as Self-Destruct.
